message:
test(ftui-extras): add 18 proptest invariants for mermaid layout engine

Property-based tests covering layout_diagram, route_all_edges, place_labels,
and evaluate_layout across random graph topologies and all GraphDirection variants.

Invariants tested: determinism, node completeness, bounding box containment,
edge path structure, stats consistency, direction coverage, objective non-negativity,
route completeness, label placement, cluster containment, rank monotonicity,
empty/single-node edge cases, and routing report consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,6 +120,7 @@ ftui-style = { path = "../ftui-style", version = "0.1.1" }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 vt100 = "0.16.2"
+proptest = "1.7.0"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "text_effects_bench"
@@ -151,6 +152,9 @@ name = "mermaid_layout_bench"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["diagram"]
 
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_mermaid_layout_invariants"
+
 [[test]]
 name = "backdrop_composition_tests"
 required-features = ["visual-fx"]

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 8d9b6fc628337d5a23ab1ec556ff36780e3d80a83833325e181fa296104a5340 # shrinks to (n, edges, dir) = (3, [(1, 0), (0, 2), (0, 1)], TB)
+cc 8d782a168e5d58586121c19ab3bc7aa71eebc7e0cd102ce391c997967eaabf31 # shrinks to (n, edges, dir) = (3, [(1, 2), (0, 2)], TB)
+cc d12513f77f5c50fe456f31da5f3f839f498a1a9b5218354b3ced13c5c901325a # shrinks to (n, edges, dir) = (4, [(2, 3), (1, 3), (1, 3), (1, 2)], LR)
